def positive_orm_model_mixes_domain_logic_and_persistence_mapping():
    rule_id = "orm_model_mixes_domain_logic_and_persistence_mapping"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "ORM model class contains domain business logic methods alongside column mapping, coupling persistence and domain concerns."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
